context: Slot A (11pm CT) produced M2-M5 (batch 1 of 4). Slot B picked up batch 2 (M6-M9). Batches 3-4 (M10-M16) remain for tomorrow's runs.

produced_detail.title: Module 6: Mendelian Genetics
topics_covered: Mendel's 3 laws (segregation, independent assortment, dominance)
Monohybrid Aa × Aa → 3:1; dihybrid 9:3:3:1
Non-Mendelian: incomplete dominance, codominance/ABO, multiple alleles, pleiotropy, polygenic, epistasis, sex-linked
Meiosis I (reductional) vs II (equational), crossing over, independent assortment, random fertilization
Linkage / recombination frequency / centimorgans
Nondisjunction → aneuploidy (Trisomy 21, XXY Klinefelter, XO Turner), polyploidy

produced_detail.title: Module 7: DNA Structure and Replication
topics_covered: DNA structure (Watson/Crick 1953, Franklin X-ray, antiparallel, A-T 2/G-C 3 H-bonds)
Chargaff's rules
Semiconservative replication (Meselson-Stahl 1958)
Replication enzymes in order (helicase, SSBPs, topoisomerase, primase, DNA pol III, pol I, ligase)
Leading vs lagging strand, Okazaki fragments
Proofreading (3'→5' exonuclease) + mismatch repair + nucleotide excision repair (xeroderma pigmentosum)
Telomeres (TTAGGG), end replication problem, telomerase

produced_detail.title: Module 8: Gene Expression — Transcription and Translation
topics_covered: Central Dogma + reverse transcriptase exception
Eukaryotic transcription (TATA box, RNA Pol II, template 3'→5' / mRNA 5'→3')
mRNA processing (5' cap, poly-A tail, splicing, alternative splicing) — prokaryote contrast
Translation (80S ribosome, A/P/E sites, codons, AUG start, stop UAA/UAG/UGA, peptide bond = rRNA ribozyme)
Operons: lac inducible vs trp repressible
Eukaryote regulation (epigenetics, TFs, miRNA/RNAi, proteasome)
Mutations: silent/missense (sickle-cell GAG→GTG)/nonsense/frameshift

produced_detail.title: Module 9: Biotechnology
topics_covered: Restriction enzymes (EcoRI/GAATTC, sticky ends), ligase, plasmids
Gel electrophoresis (DNA charge, size separation)
PCR (Mullis 1985, 95°C/55°C/72°C, Taq polymerase, 30 cycles → 10⁹×)
Sequencing (Sanger ddNTPs, NGS parallel)
CRISPR-Cas9 (gRNA + Cas9 cut, Doudna + Charpentier 2020 Nobel)
Applications: recombinant insulin 1982, gene therapy, Bt corn, Golden Rice, DNA fingerprinting/CODIS, COVID-19 PCR
Ethics: germline editing, GMO patents (Myriad BRCA), ecological risk, genetic privacy

verification.banned_terms_check: clean — no Cognia, US-accredited, UCSB, or NJIT references in any new script.json

throughput: 4 lesson-writer sub-agents spawned concurrently in one Agent batch; all 4 returned successfully on first attempt with no halts.
anomalies: Slot A's M2/M3 folders carry an _outline.json file (intermediate artifact from the cascade) that M4/M5 don't. Cosmetic only — orchestrator can ignore. No further anomalies.
